Create new loan application (wizard) and submit
workflows.on_success: creates loan in Submitted and Pending Approval status

workflows.name: Undo a transaction from the Transactions table (row action)
workflows.on_success: reverses the selected transaction and updates balances

workflows.name: Approve a Submitted (Pending Approval) loan
workflows.on_success: approves the loan and changes status to Approved

workflows.name: Disburse an Approved loan
workflows.on_success: disburses funds and changes status to Active

workflows.name: Undo Approval on an Approved loan
workflows.on_success: reverts loan status from Approved to Submitted and Pending Approval

workflows.name: Make a repayment on an Active loan
workflows.on_success: partial repayments are applied per the configured repayment strategy; full settlement changes status to Closed (obligations met)

workflows.name: Waive interest on an Active loan
Reschedule an Active loan (creates pending request)
workflows.on_success: creates a pending request requiring separate approval

workflows.name: Prepay an Active loan
workflows.on_success: applies prepayment to the loan balance

workflows.name: Foreclose an Active loan
workflows.on_success: applies foreclosure action to the loan

workflows.name: Charge off an Active loan
workflows.on_success: applies charge off action to the loan

workflows.name: Assign a Loan Officer to an Active loan
workflows.on_success: assigns selected Loan Officer to the loan

workflows.name: Make repayment-related state change that results in full settlement closing the loan (covered by Make Repayment action)
workflows.on_success: partial repayments are applied per the configured repayment strategy; full settlement changes status to Closed (obligations met)

workflows.name: Create savings account (Submit form)
workflows.on_success: creates account in Submitted and Pending Approval

workflows.name: Undo approval of an approved account
workflows.on_success: reverts approval; changes status to Submitted and Pending Approval

workflows.name: Make a deposit to an active account
Make a withdrawal from an active account
workflows.on_success: creates withdrawal transaction and debits the account

workflows.name: Post interest to an active account
Calculate interest for an active account
workflows.on_success: calculates interest according to product settings

workflows.name: Block debit on an active account
workflows.on_success: blocks debit transactions on the account

workflows.name: Block credit on an active account
workflows.on_success: blocks credit transactions on the account

workflows.name: Submit Share Account Application
workflows.on_success: creates account in Submitted and Pending Approval status

workflows.name: Approve Pending Application
workflows.on_success: moves to Approved status with Approved_Shares and Approved_Date recorded

workflows.name: Apply Additional Shares (purchase)
workflows.on_success: additional shares added to account and account totals updated

workflows.name: Redeem Shares (active account)
workflows.on_success: redemption amount calculated as shares multiplied by current unit price and credited to linked savings account

workflows.name: Create Fixed Deposit account
workflows.on_success: Fixed Deposit account created; detail page shows deposit amount, maturity date, maturity amount, interest rate, and status.

workflows.name: Create Recurring Deposit account
workflows.on_success: Recurring Deposit account created; detail page shows deposit schedule, total deposits made, maturity details, and interest rate.

workflows.name: Approve Fixed Deposit account
workflows.on_success: Fixed Deposit account approved; status updated to Approved.

workflows.name: Activate Fixed Deposit account
workflows.on_success: Fixed Deposit account activated; status updated to Active.

workflows.name: Prematurely close Fixed Deposit account
workflows.on_success: Fixed Deposit account prematurely closed; balances settled per product rules.

workflows.name: Close Fixed Deposit account on maturity
workflows.on_success: Fixed Deposit account closed on maturity; maturity amount handled per Maturity Instructions.

workflows.name: Approve Recurring Deposit account
workflows.on_success: Recurring Deposit account approved; status updated to Approved.

workflows.name: Activate Recurring Deposit account
workflows.on_success: Recurring Deposit account activated; status updated to Active.

workflows.name: Record Deposit to Recurring Deposit account
workflows.on_success: Deposit recorded against Recurring Deposit account; deposit schedule and total deposits updated.

workflows.name: Prematurely close Recurring Deposit account
workflows.on_success: Recurring Deposit account prematurely closed; balances settled per product rules.

workflows.name: Close Recurring Deposit account on maturity
workflows.on_success: Recurring Deposit account closed on maturity; maturity amount handled per product and schedule.

workflows.name: Approve Pending Command
workflows.conditional_branch: Processing Result == Pending AND maker-checker (4-eyes approval) feature flag enabled
workflows.on_success: marks the pending command as Approved and triggers post-approve processing

workflows.name: Reject Pending Command with Reason
workflows.conditional_branch: Processing Result == Pending AND maker-checker (4-eyes approval) feature flag enabled
workflows.on_success: marks the pending command as Rejected and records the rejection reason

workflows.name: Navigate to Profile Settings from profile menu
Log out (terminate session and return to Login)
workflows.conditional_branch: User is currently authenticated with an active session and a valid authentication token.
workflows.on_success: terminates session, clears authentication token, redirects to Login page; subsequent attempts to access authenticated routes redirect to Login until re-authentication
